name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: Lake Worth's ACE Cash Express at 6304 Lake Worth Blvd offers quick payday and title loans with same-day approval.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express operates at 6304 Lake Worth Boulevard in Lake Worth, TX as a standalone storefront specializing in quick financial solutions. The location is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, and Saturday 9 AM to 4 PM, making it accessible for weekday and weekend banking needs. Lake Worth residents can walk in during these hours to apply for loans without advance scheduling.

This Lake Worth location offers payday loans and title loans designed for short-term cash needs. If you need quick funds, call 817-237-4152 to discuss your options, check your approval status, or ask about required documents. The staff can explain the terms, fees, and repayment schedule specific to your loan type.

Whether you're facing an unexpected expense or bridging a gap until payday, the Lake Worth ACE Cash Express location can help. Bring your ID, proof of income, and bank account information when you visit. Same-day approval and funding are often available for qualified applicants.
address: 6304 Lake Worth Blvd, Lake Worth, TX 76135

company_info.headquarters: 6304 Lake Worth Blvd, Lake Worth, TX 76135

pros: Multiple service offerings in one location: installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, and tax services
Physical store network enabling in-person transactions across multiple states
Online loan options available for customers preferring digital application
Same-day or next-day funding capability for emergency cash needs
Dedicated customer service with multiple contact channels (phone and email)
Title loans available, allowing customers to borrow against vehicle collateral
Business services offered alongside consumer products
cons: Geographic and state-level service limitations — multiple notices indicate 'this type of loan is not available in this state'
Website navigation issues and broken location pages suggest operational or technical challenges
Limited information available on loan terms, rates, and APRs from provided website content
Temporary store closures occur (e.g., Hurricane Ida closure notice), affecting service availability
No explicit mention of borrower protections or affordable lending practices on sampled pages
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash with same-day or next-day funding capability
Vehicle owners seeking title loans against collateral
Unbanked or underbanked individuals requiring check cashing and bill payment services
Customers preferring in-person transactions at physical store locations
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers needing quick access to emergency cash or title-based collateral loans through physical retail locations. The primary caveat is significant state-by-state service availability variation and loan type restrictions — applicants must verify their specific state and loan type is available before applying, as the website explicitly states certain loans are unavailable in specific states.
meta_description: ACE Cash Express at 6304 Lake Worth Blvd, Lake Worth, TX. Quick payday and title loans with same-day funding available.
